system.notes:
Abilities

  • Leaping Attack: If the Syman moves at least 3 meters toward a target, and their next action is to attack that target, they gain the Reroll 1’s benefit on their attack test – reroll any dice that roll a 1, excluding their Crit Dice, and use the new result.
  • Swift: The Syman can take the Run action as a Minor Action, and the Move Action as a Free action (but can still only take each once per Combat Turn). The Syman does not suffer Liability on tests when they take the Run action. SYMAN 1-87

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Ultrasound, Vision Magnification:
  • Mash the Trigger: The Syman does not suffer recoil
  • penalties.:
  • Hot-sim: The Syman generally operates in hot-sim,
  • making it vulnerable to biofeedback damage.:
